title: weapon-models
markdown:
* { box-sizing: border-box; }
   body { margin: 0; overflow-x: hidden; }
   .category { margin-bottom: 40px; }
   .category h2 { text-align: left; margin-top: 30px; margin-bottom: 10px; padding-left: 20px; }
   .weapons { display: flex; flex-wrap: wrap; gap: 20px; padding: 20px; }
   .weapon { background: #FFF; color: #000; border: 1px solid #CCC; border-radius: 8px; overflow: hidden; box-shadow: 0 2px 5px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.1); transition: box-shadow 0.3s ease-in-out; font-family: 'Segoe UI', Tahoma, Geneva, Verdana, sans-serif; display: flex; flex-direction: column; justify-content: space-between; height: 100%; min-width: 220px; max-width: 300px; }
   .weapon img { width: 100%; height: 100px; object-fit: scale-down; display: block; padding: 10px; border-radius: 8px; }
   .weapon-info { padding: 5px 10px; font-size: 0.8em; background: #F7F7F7; border-top: 1px solid #DDD; color: #333; text-align: left; display: flex; flex-direction: column; justify-content: center; align-items: flex-start; flex-grow: 1; }
   .weapon-info span.hash-key { white-space:normal; max-width: 300px; }
   .weapon-info span.weapon-description { white-space:normal; max-width: 220px; }
   .weapon-info span { margin: 2px 0; }
   .weapon-info span:last-child { margin-bottom: 0; }
   .components, .tints { margin-top: 10px; }
   .no-image { text-align: center; padding: 20px; background: #f0f0f0; color: #666; font-style: italic; border: 1px solid #ccc; border-radius: 8px; }
   details { cursor: pointer; font-weight: bold; background: #F7F7F7; border-top: 1px solid #DDD; margin-top: 10px; padding: 5px; width: 200px; overflow-x: auto; }
   summary { margin: 0; padding: 5px; }

weapon_models.description: All you need to know is — magnets, and it does horrible things to the things it's pointed at.

weapon_models.name: Combat Shotgun
weapon_models.description: There's only one semi-automatic shotgun with a fire rate that sets the LSFD alarm bells ringing, and you're looking at it.

weapon_models.name: Sweeper Shotgun
weapon_models.description: How many effective tools for riot control can you tuck into your pants? OK, two. But this is the other one. Part of Bikers.

weapon_models.name: Pump Shotgun
weapon_models.description: Standard shotgun ideal for short-range combat. A high-projectile spread makes up for its lower accuracy at long range.

weapon_models.name: Heavy Shotgun
weapon_models.description: The weapon to reach for when you absolutely need to make a horrible mess of the room. Best used near easy-wipe surfaces only. Part of the Last Team Standing Update.

weapon_models.name: Pump Shotgun Mk II
weapon_models.description: Only one thing pumps more action than a pump action: watch out, the recoil is almost as deadly as the shot.

weapon_models.name: Sawed-Off Shotgun
weapon_models.description: This single-barrel, sawed-off shotgun compensates for its low range and ammo capacity with devastating efficiency in close combat.

weapon_models.name: Bullpup Shotgun
weapon_models.description: More than makes up for its slow, pump-action rate of fire with its range and spread.  Decimates anything in its projectile path.

weapon_models.name: Assault Shotgun
weapon_models.description: Fully automatic shotgun with 8 round magazine and high rate of fire.

weapon_models.name: Double Barrel Shotgun
weapon_models.description: Do one thing, do it well. Who needs a high rate of fire when your first shot turns the other guy into a fine mist? Part of Lowriders: Custom Classics.

weapon_models.name: Sniper Rifle
weapon_models.description: Standard sniper rifle. Ideal for situations that require accuracy at long range. Limitations include slow reload speed and very low rate of fire.

weapon_models.name: Heavy Sniper Mk II
weapon_models.description: Far away, yet always intimate: if you're looking for a secure foundation for that long-distance relationship, this is it.

weapon_models.name: Heavy Sniper
weapon_models.description: Features armor-piercing rounds for heavy damage. Comes with laser scope as standard.

weapon_models.name: Marksman Rifle Mk II
weapon_models.description: Known in military circles as The Dislocator, this mod set will destroy both the target and your shoulder, in that order.

weapon_models.name: Precision Rifle
weapon_models.description: A rifle for perfectionists. Because why settle for right-between-the-eyes, when you could have right-through-the-superior-frontal-gyrus?

weapon_models.name: Musket
weapon_models.description: Armed with nothing but muskets and a superiority complex, the Brits took over half the world. Own the gun that built an empire. Part of the Independence Day Special.

weapon_models.name: Marksman Rifle
weapon_models.description: Whether you're up close or a disconcertingly long way away, this weapon will get the job done. A multi-range tool for tools. Part of the Last Team Standing Update.

weapon_models.name: Molotov
weapon_models.description: Crude yet highly effective incendiary weapon. No happy hour with this cocktail.

weapon_models.name: Sticky Bomb
weapon_models.description: A plastic explosive charge fitted with a remote detonator. Can be thrown and then detonated or attached to a vehicle then detonated.

weapon_models.name: Grenade
weapon_models.description: Standard fragmentation grenade. Pull pin, throw, then find cover. Ideal for eliminating clustered assailants.

weapon_models.name: Proximity Mine
weapon_models.description: Leave a present for your friends with these motion sensor landmines. Short delay after activation. Part of the Festive Surprise.

weapon_models.name: Pipe Bomb
weapon_models.description: Remember, it doesn't count as an IED when you buy it in a store and use it in a first world country. Part of Bikers.

weapon_models.name: Tear Gas
weapon_models.description: Tear gas grenade, particularly effective at incapacitating multiple assailants. Sustained exposure can be lethal.

weapon_models.name: Vintage Pistol
weapon_models.description: What you really need is a more recognizable gun. Stand out from the crowd at an armed robbery with this engraved pistol. Part of The "I'm Not a Hipster" Update.

weapon_models.name: Pistol
weapon_models.description: Standard handgun. A .45 caliber pistol with a magazine capacity of 12 rounds that can be extended to 16.

weapon_models.name: WM 29 Pistol
weapon_models.description: If you think shooting off without lifting a finger is a problem, there's a pill for that. But if you think it's a plus, there's the semi-automatic WM 29 Pistol.

weapon_models.name: AP Pistol
weapon_models.description: High-penetration, fully-automatic pistol. Holds 18 rounds in magazine with option to extend to 36 rounds.

weapon_models.name: Ceramic Pistol
weapon_models.description: Not your grandma's ceramics. Although this pint-sized pistol is small enough to fit into her purse and won't set off a metal detector.

weapon_models.name: Flare Gun
weapon_models.description: Use to signal distress or drunken excitement. Warning: pointing directly at individuals may cause spontaneous combustion. Part of The Heists Update.

weapon_models.name: Perico Pistol
weapon_models.description: A deadly shot. Don't be precious. You won't scuff the titanium nitride finish.

weapon_models.name: Combat Pistol
weapon_models.description: A compact, lightweight, semi-automatic pistol designed for law enforcement and personal defense. 12-round magazine with option to extend to 16 rounds.

weapon_models.name: SNS Pistol Mk II
weapon_models.description: The ultimate purse-filler: if you want to make Saturday Night really special, this is your ticket.

weapon_models.name: Navy Revolver
weapon_models.description: A true museum piece. You want to know how the West was won - slow reload speeds and a whole heap of bloodshed.

weapon_models.name: Double-Action Revolver
weapon_models.description: Because sometimes revenge is a dish best served six times, in quick succession, right between the eyes. Part of The Doomsday Heist.

weapon_models.name: Pistol .50
weapon_models.description: High-impact pistol that delivers immense power but with extremely strong recoil. Holds 9 rounds in magazine.

weapon_models.name: Up-n-Atomizer
weapon_models.description: Republican Space Ranger Special, fresh from the galactic war on socialism: no ammo, no mag, just one brutal energy pulse after another.

weapon_models.name: SNS Pistol
weapon_models.description: Like condoms or hairspray, this fits in your pocket for a night out in a Vinewood club. It's half as accurate as a champagne cork but twice as deadly. Part of the Beach Bum Pack.

weapon_models.name: Pistol Mk II
weapon_models.description: Balance, simplicity, precision: nothing keeps the peace like an extended barrel in the other guy's mouth.

weapon_models.name: Heavy Revolver
weapon_models.description: A handgun with enough stopping power to drop a crazed rhino, and heavy enough to beat it to death if you're out of ammo. Part of Executives and Other Criminals.

weapon_models.name: Heavy Revolver Mk II
weapon_models.description: If you can lift it, this is the closest you'll get to shooting someone with a freight train.

weapon_models.name: Heavy Pistol
weapon_models.description: The heavyweight champion of the magazine fed, semi-automatic handgun world. Delivers a serious forearm workout every time. Part of The Business Update.

weapon_models.name: Marksman Pistol
weapon_models.description: Not for the risk averse. Make it count as you'll be reloading as much as you shoot. Part of The Ill-Gotten Gains Update Part 2.

weapon_models.name: Combat PDW
weapon_models.description: Who said personal weaponry couldn't be worthy of military personnel? Thanks to our lobbyists, not Congress. Integral suppressor. Part of the Ill-Gotten Gains Update Part 1.

weapon_models.name: Micro SMG
weapon_models.description: Combines compact design with a high rate of fire at approximately 700-900 rounds per minute.

weapon_models.name: Tactical SMG
weapon_models.description: Ever been on the wrong side of the Micro SMG's big bad brother? Trust us, with double the capacity for conflict resolution, you'd know.

weapon_models.name: SMG
weapon_models.description: This is known as a good all-round submachine gun. Lightweight with an accurate sight and 30-round magazine capacity.

weapon_models.name: SMG Mk II
weapon_models.description: Lightweight, compact, with a rate of fire to die very messily for: turn any confined space into a kill box at the click of a well-oiled trigger.

weapon_models.name: Mini SMG
weapon_models.description: Increasingly popular since the marketing team looked beyond spec ops units and started caring about the little guys in low income areas. Part of Bikers.

weapon_models.name: Machine Pistol
weapon_models.description: This fully automatic is the snare drum to your twin-engine V8 bass: no drive-by sounds quite right without it. Part of Lowriders.

weapon_models.name: Assault SMG
weapon_models.description: A high-capacity submachine gun that is both compact and lightweight. Holds up to 30 bullets in one magazine.

weapon_models.name: Jerry Can
weapon_models.description: Leaves a trail of gasoline that can be ignited.

weapon_models.name: Pipe Wrench
weapon_models.description: Perennial favourite of apocalyptic survivalists and violent fathers the world over, apparently it also doubles as some kind of tool. Part of Bikers.

weapon_models.name: Stone Hatchet
weapon_models.description: There's retro, there's vintage, and there's this. After 500 years of technological development and spiritual apocalypse, pre-Colombian chic is back.

weapon_models.name: Golf Club
weapon_models.description: Standard length, mid iron golf club with rubber grip for a lethal short game.

weapon_models.name: Hammer
weapon_models.description: A robust, multi-purpose hammer with wooden handle and curved claw, this old classic still nails the competition.

weapon_models.name: Candy Cane
weapon_models.description: This year, why not go one step further? Add to the onslaught of music, lights, and merriment by literally beating your peers to death with the festive spirit.

weapon_models.name: Nightstick
weapon_models.description: 24" polycarbonate side-handled nightstick.

weapon_models.name: Crowbar
weapon_models.description: Heavy-duty crowbar forged from high quality, tempered steel for that extra leverage you need to get the job done.

weapon_models.name: Flashlight
weapon_models.description: Intensify your fear of the dark with this short range, battery-powered light source. Handy for blunt force trauma. Part of The Halloween Surprise.

weapon_models.name: Antique Cavalry Dagger
weapon_models.description: You've been rocking the pirate-chic look for a while, but no vicious weapon to complete the look? Get this dagger with guarded hilt. Part of The "I'm Not a Hipster" Update.

weapon_models.name: Pool Cue
weapon_models.description: Ah, there's no sound as satisfying as the crack of a perfect break, especially when it's the other guy's spine. Part of Bikers.

weapon_models.name: Baseball Bat
weapon_models.description: Aluminum baseball bat with leather grip. Lightweight yet powerful for all you big hitters out there.

weapon_models.name: Knife
weapon_models.description: This carbon steel 7" bladed knife is dual edged with a serrated spine to provide improved stabbing and thrusting capabilities.

weapon_models.name: Battle Axe
weapon_models.description: If it's good enough for medieval foot soldiers, modern border guards and pushy soccer moms, it's good enough for you. Part of Bikers.

weapon_models.name: The Shocker
weapon_models.description: When blunt force trauma just isn't enough, consider diversifying your approach to aggravated assault with a dose of 30,000 volts.

weapon_models.name: Machete
weapon_models.description: America's West African arms trade isn't just about giving. Rediscover the simple life with this rusty cleaver. Part of Lowriders.

weapon_models.name: Switchblade
weapon_models.description: From your pocket to hilt-deep in the other guy's ribs in under a second: folding knives will never go out of style. Part of Executives and Other Criminals.

weapon_models.name: Hatchet
weapon_models.description: Make kindling... of your pals with this easy to wield, easy to hide hatchet. Exclusive content for returning players.

weapon_models.name: Bottle
weapon_models.description: It's not clever and it's not pretty but, most of the time, neither is the guy coming at you with a knife. When all else fails, this gets the job done. Part of the Beach Bum Pack.

weapon_models.name: Stun Gun
weapon_models.description: Fires a projectile that administers a voltage capable of temporarily stunning an assailant. Takes approximately 4 seconds to recharge after firing.

weapon_models.name: Stun Gun
weapon_models.description: It's, like, literally stunning.

weapon_models.name: Assault Rifle Mk II
weapon_models.description: The definitive revision of an all-time classic: all it takes is a little work, and looks can kill after all.

weapon_models.name: Compact Rifle
weapon_models.description: Half the size, all the power, double the recoil: there's no riskier way to say "I'm compensating for something". Part of Lowriders: Custom Classics.

weapon_models.name: Battle Rifle
weapon_models.description: Does life feel like a daily battle? Then why not try the Battle Rifle: the fast-acting pick-me-up that flawlessly targets every pain in your ass. Part of The Chop Shop.

weapon_models.name: Bullpup Rifle
weapon_models.description: The latest Chinese import taking America by storm, this rifle is known for its balanced handling. Lightweight and very controllable in automatic fire. Part of The High Life Update.

weapon_models.name: Carbine Rifle
weapon_models.description: Combining long distance accuracy with a high-capacity magazine, the carbine rifle can be relied on to make the hit.

weapon_models.name: Bullpup Rifle Mk II
weapon_models.description: So precise, so exquisite, it's not so much a hail of bullets as a symphony.

weapon_models.name: Special Carbine Mk II
weapon_models.description: The jack of all trades just got a serious upgrade: bow to the master.

weapon_models.name: Military Rifle
weapon_models.description: This immensely powerful assault rifle was designed for highly qualified, exceptionally skilled soldiers. Yes, you can buy it.

weapon_models.name: Advanced Rifle
weapon_models.description: The most lightweight and compact of all assault rifles, without compromising accuracy and rate of fire.

weapon_models.name: Assault Rifle
weapon_models.description: This standard assault rifle boasts a large capacity magazine and long distance accuracy.

weapon_models.name: Special Carbine
weapon_models.description: Combining accuracy, maneuverability and low recoil, this is an extremely versatile assault rifle for any combat situation. Part of The Business Update.

weapon_models.name: Heavy Rifle
weapon_models.description: The no-holds-barred 30-round answer to that eternal question, how do I get this guy off my back?

weapon_models.name: Service Carbine
weapon_models.description: This season's must-have hardware for law enforcement, military personnel and anyone locked in a fight to the death with either law enforcement or military personnel.

weapon_models.name: Carbine Rifle Mk II
weapon_models.description: This is bespoke, artisan firepower: you couldn't deliver a hail of bullets with more love and care if you inserted them by hand.

weapon_models.name: Unholy Hellbringer
weapon_models.description: Republican Space Ranger Special. If you want to turn a little green man into little green goo, this is the only American way to do it.

weapon_models.name: Gusenberg Sweeper
weapon_models.description: Complete your look with a Prohibition gun. Looks great being fired from an Albany Roosevelt or paired with a pinstripe suit. Part of the Valentine's Day Massacre Special.

weapon_models.name: Combat MG
weapon_models.description: Lightweight, compact machine gun that combines excellent maneuverability with a high rate of fire to devastating effect.

weapon_models.name: MG
weapon_models.description: General purpose machine gun that combines rugged design with dependable performance. Long range penetrative power. Very effective against large groups.

weapon_models.name: Combat MG Mk II
weapon_models.description: You can never have too much of a good thing: after all, if the first shot counts, then the next hundred or so must count for double.

weapon_models.name: Knuckle Duster
weapon_models.description: Perfect for knocking out gold teeth, or as a gift to the trophy partner who has everything. Part of The Ill-Gotten Gains Update Part 2.
